title: [MobArena Addon] HavenArena - Extra Customizable Features
description: Add extra customizable features to your MobArenas, including new boss abilities and monster glow.
body:
Please Read Me This plugin is in alpha/under development.
This means some things aren't perfect, and support is limited.
I'm not the greatest developer, and I can't make something too big.
The plugin has only been tested on Minecraft 1.20.4 & 1.21.1 with MobArena v0.109, but should still work on versions 1.18 and up.
![https://i.gyazo.com/0f092f921ce8b7685c31742c66bb131d.png](https://i.gyazo.com/0f092f921ce8b7685c31742c66bb131d.png)

![https://i.gyazo.com/c0d1d22540b9da87079579be5a9cca00.png](https://i.gyazo.com/c0d1d22540b9da87079579be5a9cca00.png)
HavenArena is an addon to the [**MobArena** ]('https://www.spigotmc.org/resources/mobarena.34110/')plugin, adding a few features.

![https://i.gyazo.com/758611e69ebb1e27863710a06fdf169f.png](https://i.gyazo.com/758611e69ebb1e27863710a06fdf169f.png)
The plugin requires [**ValorlessUtils v1.8.0.236**]('https://www.spigotmc.org/resources/valorlessutils-1-17-1-21-1.109586/') or newer, in order to work.
I use this library to not having to re-make and constantly update functions and utilities.

![https://i.gyazo.com/1b4efd083ccddb26b4c067a9920d384d.png](https://i.gyazo.com/1b4efd083ccddb26b4c067a9920d384d.png)
![https://i.gyazo.com/6308e97024c36458c08a39c4cdca11fb.png](https://i.gyazo.com/6308e97024c36458c08a39c4cdca11fb.png)
Add new Boss abilities to your arenas, or change the settings of MobArena's own abilities!
My Custom Abilities - KnockupAll
Knock all players up in the air.

- KnockupNeaby
Knock nearby players up in the air.

- KnockupRandom
Knock a random player up in the air.

- KnockupTarget
Knock the Boss' target up in the air.

- ShuffleHotbar
Shuffle all players hotbars, or a random player.

- Minions
Summon minions for the boss.

- MinionsSacrifice
Sacrifice all minions to heal the boss.

- MinionsExplode
Explode all minions, dealing damage to players near them.

- Arrow Rain
Rain arrows in a radius above the boss.

- BarrageAll
Fire a barrage of rapidly fired arrows at all players.

- BarrageNeaby
Fire a barrage of rapidly fired arrows at all nearby players.

- BarrageRandom
Fire a barrage of rapidly fired arrows at a random player.

- BarrageTarget
Fire a barrage of rapidly fired arrows at the Boss' target.

- Potion Rain
Rain splash potions in a radius above the boss.

- Potion Rain Lingering
Rain lingering potions in a radius above the boss.



![https://i.gyazo.com/a712da100b2cbeacade4037bce706e88.png](https://i.gyazo.com/a712da100b2cbeacade4037bce706e88.png)
On-screen titles for events such as arena start, new wave, player death.
![https://i.gyazo.com/b91f2085deb27d6476bf80ebe834882c.png](https://i.gyazo.com/b91f2085deb27d6476bf80ebe834882c.png)
Also comes with a boss title, which can also contain the boss' name.

![https://i.gyazo.com/b1a2cf9535ecf28be038795d502bb8a1.png](https://i.gyazo.com/b1a2cf9535ecf28be038795d502bb8a1.png)
Show how many mobs are left in the arena, when a certain amount of mobs are left.
![https://i.gyazo.com/734249fb19060dc8749e63ddf98fb13a.png](https://i.gyazo.com/734249fb19060dc8749e63ddf98fb13a.png)
Can also be shown on the actionbar instead.

![https://i.gyazo.com/1cb15cba83d3bfee2111762fc4dea227.png](https://i.gyazo.com/1cb15cba83d3bfee2111762fc4dea227.png)
When only a few mobs are left, they start to glow.
Making them easier to locate, as some mobs can be very good at hide & seek.
![https://i.gyazo.com/7864c8585ce298f3575378514e06bb80.png](https://i.gyazo.com/7864c8585ce298f3575378514e06bb80.png)

![https://i.gyazo.com/37a52d2f676e9e5c36a6f55da6ab1f6e.png](https://i.gyazo.com/37a52d2f676e9e5c36a6f55da6ab1f6e.png)
Heal players at the start of every wave or boss fight.

![https://i.gyazo.com/566b1ade1d2ebc7eb3d93cb67221b949.png](https://i.gyazo.com/566b1ade1d2ebc7eb3d93cb67221b949.png)
Allow players to preview class kits by picking the class, but not being allowed to ready up as it. ![https://i.gyazo.com/ce51e245605107d7eb5f852742426418.png](https://i.gyazo.com/ce51e245605107d7eb5f852742426418.png)

![https://i.gyazo.com/7a5c1adeb65d77ee3b1d5b23db767e71.png](https://i.gyazo.com/7a5c1adeb65d77ee3b1d5b23db767e71.png)
**[PlaceholderAPI](https://www.spigotmc.org/resources/placeholderapi.6245/)**
[![https://i.gyazo.com/dd09b0af9ad3d79b6e0ff47fa5117ca3.png](https://i.gyazo.com/dd09b0af9ad3d79b6e0ff47fa5117ca3.png)](https://www.spigotmc.org/resources/placeholderapi.6245/)
Please note, that while HavenArena does support other plugins, the intention with the plugin is not to add support of plugins to MobArena, only to HavenArena.​
